description: This square-toed three-hole lace up shoes from woodland references the classic penny loafer in style and the boat shoe in silhouetting and the stitch detail. Meticulously designed for optimal foot freedom, this shoe is crafted with a beautifully tanned caramel shade leather. Style this with classic denims, a monochrome tee and a tonal jacket.UpperTwo-tone suede upper with aggressive stitch detailCentral three-hole lace upsPadded tongueEmbossed branding on the midfootNubuck liningPadded insole for instep comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric grooves for grip and tractionOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
